message:
fix(freeze): add missing _locals_jsv sync for put_loc8, set_loc8, put_loc_check

These opcodes were missing the JSValue shadow array sync after local
assignment. This caused closure forward references to see stale values
when the closure creator used put_loc8/set_loc8 instead of the numbered
variants (put_loc0-3, etc).

The sync is needed for function hoisting support - when a function is
assigned to a local that was captured by an earlier-defined closure,
the closure needs to see the updated value via the shared var_refs.
